en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid Social Security contribution settlement receipt or a payment proof in the Spain Social Security  Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

The Social Security contribution settlement receipt shows that a company is up to date with its Social Security contribution obligations or has no outstanding debts. The contribution settlement receipt obtains this certificate through the Social Security electronic services portal. The document must be issued within 30 days of submission.
Please upload your company’s most recent Social Security contribution settlement receipt for the latest payroll period.\n\nIf the RLC is not available, upload the payment proof for the same period.
The Issue date must be within the last 30 days.
Please enter the issue date of your Social Security contribution settlement receipt or payment proof.
As an authorized signatory, I confirm that Payroll Contributions are up-to-date and records are available upon request.
